1.meaning: In (the) name (of) Allah the Most Gracious the Most Merciful

4.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ ٱتَّقُوا۟ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُم مِّن نَّفْسٍۢ وَٰحِدَةٍۢ وَخَلَقَ مِنْهَا زَوْجَهَا وَبَثَّ مِنْهُمَا رِجَالًۭا كَثِيرًۭا وَنِسَآءًۭ ۚ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِى تَسَآءَلُونَ بِهِۦ وَٱلْأَرْحَامَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلَيْكُمْ رَقِيبًۭا
4.meaning: O mankind Fear your Lord the One Who created you from a soul single and created from it its mate and dispersed from both of them men many and women And fear Allah (through) Whom you ask [with it] and the wombs Indeed Allah is over you Ever-Watchful

5.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَوْفُوا۟ بِٱلْعُقُودِ ۚ أُحِلَّتْ لَكُم بَهِيمَةُ ٱلْأَنْعَـٰمِ إِلَّا مَا يُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْكُمْ غَيْرَ مُحِلِّى ٱلصَّيْدِ وَأَنتُمْ حُرُمٌ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَحْكُمُ مَا يُرِيدُ
5.meaning: O you (who) believe Fulfil the contracts Are made lawful for you the quadruped (of) the grazing livestock except what is recited on you not being permitted (to) hunt while you (are in) Ihram Indeed Allah decrees what He wills

6.arabic: ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَجَعَلَ ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتِ وَٱلنُّورَ ۖ ثُمَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِرَبِّهِمْ يَعْدِلُونَ
6.meaning: (All) the praises and thanks (be) to Allah the One Who created the heavens and the earth and made the darkness[es] and the light Then those who disbelieved in their Lord equate others with Him

8.arabic: يَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلْأَنفَالِ ۖ قُلِ ٱلْأَنفَالُ لِلَّهِ وَٱلرَّسُولِ ۖ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَصْلِحُوا۟ ذَاتَ بَيْنِكُمْ ۖ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
8.meaning: They ask you about the spoils of war Say The spoils of war (are) for Allah and the Messenger So fear Allah and set right that (which is) between you and obey Allah and His Messenger if you are believers

9.arabic: بَرَآءَةٌۭ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦٓ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ عَـٰهَدتُّم مِّنَ ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ
9.meaning: Freedom from obligations from Allah and His Messenger to those (with) whom you made a covenant from the polytheists

10.meaning: Alif Lam Ra These (are the) verses (of) the Book the wise

11.arabic: الٓر ۚ كِتَـٰبٌ أُحْكِمَتْ ءَايَـٰتُهُۥ ثُمَّ فُصِّلَتْ مِن لَّدُنْ حَكِيمٍ خَبِيرٍ
11.meaning: Alif Lam Ra (This is) a Book are perfected its Verses moreover explained in detail from (he One Who) from (he One Who) (is) All-Wise All-Aware

12.meaning: Alif Laam Ra These (are the) Verses (of) the Book [the] clear

13.arabic: الٓمٓر ۚ تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ ۗ وَٱلَّذِىٓ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ مِن رَّبِّكَ ٱلْحَقُّ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
13.meaning: Alif Laam Mim Ra These (are) the Verses (of) the Book And that which has been revealed to you from your Lord (is) the truth but most (of) the mankind (do) not believe

14.arabic: الٓر ۚ كِتَـٰبٌ أَنزَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَيْكَ لِتُخْرِجَ ٱلنَّاسَ مِنَ ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِ بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ
14.meaning: Alif Laam Ra A Book which We have revealed to you so that you may bring out the mankind from the darkness[es] to the light by the permission (of) their Lord to the Path (of) the All-Mighty the Praiseworthy

15.arabic: الٓر ۚ تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَقُرْءَانٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
15.meaning: Alif Laam Ra These (are) the Verses (of) the Book and Quran clear

16.arabic: أَتَىٰٓ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ فَلَا تَسْتَعْجِلُوهُ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَهُۥ وَتَعَـٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
16.meaning: Will come (the) command of Allah (the) command of Allah so (do) not (be) impatient for it Glorified is He and Exalted (is) He above what they associate

17.arabic: سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَسْرَىٰ بِعَبْدِهِۦ لَيْلًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْمَسْجِدِ ٱلْحَرَامِ إِلَى ٱلْمَسْجِدِ ٱلْأَقْصَا ٱلَّذِى بَـٰرَكْنَا حَوْلَهُۥ لِنُرِيَهُۥ مِنْ ءَايَـٰتِنَآ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْبَصِيرُ
17.meaning: Exalted (is) the One Who took His servant (by) night from Al-Masjid Al-Haraam Al-Masjid Al-Haraam to Al-Masjid Al-Aqsa Al-Masjid Al-Aqsa which We blessed its surroundings that We may show him of Our Signs Indeed He He (is) the All-Hearer the All-Seer

18.arabic: ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنزَلَ عَلَىٰ عَبْدِهِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَلَمْ يَجْعَل لَّهُۥ عِوَجَاۜ
18.meaning: All Praise (is) for Allah the One Who (has) revealed to His slave the Book and not (has) made in it any crookedness

21.arabic: ٱقْتَرَبَ لِلنَّاسِ حِسَابُهُمْ وَهُمْ فِى غَفْلَةٍۢ مُّعْرِضُونَ
21.meaning: (Has) approached for [the] mankind their account while they (are) in heedlessness turning away

22.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ ٱتَّقُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ ۚ إِنَّ زَلْزَلَةَ ٱلسَّاعَةِ شَىْءٌ عَظِيمٌۭ
22.meaning: O mankind O mankind Fear your Lord Indeed (the) convulsion (of) the Hour (is) a thing great

24.arabic: سُورَةٌ أَنزَلْنَـٰهَا وَفَرَضْنَـٰهَا وَأَنزَلْنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَـٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَـٰتٍۢ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
24.meaning: A Surah  We (have) sent it down and We (have) made it obligatory and We (have) revealed therein Verses clear so that you may take heed

25.arabic: تَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِى نَزَّلَ ٱلْفُرْقَانَ عَلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦ لِيَكُونَ لِلْعَـٰلَمِينَ نَذِيرًا
25.meaning: Blessed is He Who sent down the Criterion upon His slave that he may be to the worlds a warner

27.arabic: طسٓ ۚ تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْقُرْءَانِ وَكِتَابٍۢ مُّبِينٍ
27.meaning: Ta Seen These (are the) Verses (of) the Quran and a Book clear

33.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِىُّ ٱتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُطِعِ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ وَٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًۭا
33.meaning: O Prophet O Prophet Fear Allah and (do) not obey the disbelievers and the hypocrites Indeed Allah is All-Knower All-Wise

34.arabic: ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَهُ ٱلْحَمْدُ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ
34.meaning: All praises (be) to Allah the One to Whom belongs the One to Whom belongs whatever (is) in the heavens and whatever (is) in the earth and for Him (are) all praises in the Hereafter And He (is) the All-Wise the All-Aware

35.arabic: ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ فَاطِرِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ جَاعِلِ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ رُسُلًا أُو۟لِىٓ أَجْنِحَةٍۢ مَّثْنَىٰ وَثُلَـٰثَ وَرُبَـٰعَ ۚ يَزِيدُ فِى ٱلْخَلْقِ مَا يَشَآءُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌۭ
35.meaning: All praises (be) to Allah Originator (of) the heavens and the earth (Who) makes the Angels messengers having wings having wings two or three or four He increases in the creation what He wills Indeed Allah (is) on every thing All-Powerful

38.meaning: Saad By the Quran full (of) reminder full (of) reminder

39.arabic: تَنزِيلُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
39.meaning: (The) revelation (of) the Book (is) from Allah the All-Mighty the All-Wise

47.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَصَدُّوا۟ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ أَضَلَّ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ
47.meaning: Those who disbelieve and turn away from (the) way of Allah (the) way of Allah He will cause to be lost their deeds

48.meaning: Indeed We have given victory to you a victory clear

49.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تُقَدِّمُوا۟ بَيْنَ يَدَىِ ٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌۭ
49.meaning: O you who believe O you who believe O you who believe (Do) not put (yourselves) forward  before Allah before Allah before Allah and His Messenger and fear Allah and fear Allah Indeed Allah (is) All-Hearer All-Knower

50.meaning: Qaf By the Quran the Glorious

53.meaning: By the star when it goes down

54.meaning: Has come near the Hour and has split the moon

57.arabic: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
57.meaning: Glorifies [to] Allah whatever (is) in the heavens and the earth and He (is) the All-Mighty the All-Wise

58.arabic: قَدْ سَمِعَ ٱللَّهُ قَوْلَ ٱلَّتِى تُجَـٰدِلُكَ فِى زَوْجِهَا وَتَشْتَكِىٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ وَٱللَّهُ يَسْمَعُ تَحَاوُرَكُمَآ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌۢ بَصِيرٌ
58.meaning: Indeed Allah has heard Allah has heard (the) speech (of one) who disputes with you concerning her husband and she directs her complaint to Allah And Allah hears (the) dialogue of both of you Indeed Allah (is) All-Hearer All-Seer

59.arabic: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
59.meaning: Glorifies [to] Allah whatever (is) in the heavens and whatever (is) in the earth And He (is) the All-Mighty the All-Wise

60.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَتَّخِذُوا۟ عَدُوِّى وَعَدُوَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَآءَ تُلْقُونَ إِلَيْهِم بِٱلْمَوَدَّةِ وَقَدْ كَفَرُوا۟ بِمَا جَآءَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْحَقِّ يُخْرِجُونَ ٱلرَّسُولَ وَإِيَّاكُمْ ۙ أَن تُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ رَبِّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ خَرَجْتُمْ جِهَـٰدًۭا فِى سَبِيلِى وَٱبْتِغَآءَ مَرْضَاتِى ۚ تُسِرُّونَ إِلَيْهِم بِٱلْمَوَدَّةِ وَأَنَا۠ أَعْلَمُ بِمَآ أَخْفَيْتُمْ وَمَآ أَعْلَنتُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَفْعَلْهُ مِنكُمْ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ سَوَآءَ ٱلسَّبِيلِ
60.meaning: O you who believe (Do) not take My enemies and your enemies (as) allies offering them love while they have disbelieved in what came to you of the truth driving out the Messenger and yourselves because you believe in Allah your Lord If you come forth (to) strive in My way and (to) seek My Pleasure You confide to them love but I Am most knowing of what you conceal and what you declare And whoever does it among you then certainly he has strayed (from the) straight path

61.arabic: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
61.meaning: Glorifies Allah whatever (is) in the heavens and whatever (is) in the earth And He (is) the All-Mighty the All-Wise

62.arabic: يُسَبِّحُ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْمَلِكِ ٱلْقُدُّوسِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
62.meaning: Glorifies Allah whatever (is) in the heavens and whatever (is) in the earth the Sovereign the Holy the All-Mighty the All-Wise

63.arabic: إِذَا جَآءَكَ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقُونَ قَالُوا۟ نَشْهَدُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُهُۥ وَٱللَّهُ يَشْهَدُ إِنَّ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ لَكَـٰذِبُونَ
63.meaning: When come to you the hypocrites they say We testify that you (are) surely (the) Messenger (of) Allah And Allah knows that you (are) surely His Messenger and Allah testifies that the hypocrites (are) surely liars

64.arabic: يُسَبِّحُ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ لَهُ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ ٱلْحَمْدُ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌ
64.meaning: Glorifies [to] Allah whatever (is) in the heavens and whatever (is) in the earth For Him (is the) dominion and for Him (is) the praise And He (is) on every thing All-Powerful

65.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِىُّ إِذَا طَلَّقْتُمُ ٱلنِّسَآءَ فَطَلِّقُوهُنَّ لِعِدَّتِهِنَّ وَأَحْصُوا۟ ٱلْعِدَّةَ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ رَبَّكُمْ ۖ لَا تُخْرِجُوهُنَّ مِنۢ بُيُوتِهِنَّ وَلَا يَخْرُجْنَ إِلَّآ أَن يَأْتِينَ بِفَـٰحِشَةٍۢ مُّبَيِّنَةٍۢ ۚ وَتِلْكَ حُدُودُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَمَن يَتَعَدَّ حُدُودَ ٱللَّهِ فَقَدْ ظَلَمَ نَفْسَهُۥ ۚ لَا تَدْرِى لَعَلَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحْدِثُ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ أَمْرًۭا
65.meaning: O Prophet When you divorce [the] women then divorce them for their waiting period and keep count (of) the waiting period and fear Allah your Lord (Do) not expel them from their houses and not they should leave except that they commit an immorality clear And these (are the) limits (of) Allah And whoever transgresses (the) limits (of) Allah then certainly he has wronged himself Not you know Perhaps Allah will bring about after that a matter

66.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِىُّ لِمَ تُحَرِّمُ مَآ أَحَلَّ ٱللَّهُ لَكَ ۖ تَبْتَغِى مَرْضَاتَ أَزْوَٰجِكَ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
66.meaning: O Prophet Why (do) you prohibit what has made lawful Allah for you seeking (to) please your wives And Allah (is) Oft-Forgiving Most Merciful

67.arabic: تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌ
67.meaning: Blessed is He in Whose Hand (is) the Dominion and He (is) over every thing All-Powerful

68.meaning: Nun By the pen and what they write

70.meaning: Asked a questioner about a punishment bound to happen

71.arabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ
71.meaning: Indeed, We [We] sent Nuh to his people that Warn your people from before [that] comes to them a punishment painful

72.arabic: قُلْ أُوحِىَ إِلَىَّ أَنَّهُ ٱسْتَمَعَ نَفَرٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا سَمِعْنَا قُرْءَانًا عَجَبًۭا
72.meaning: Say It has been revealed to me that listened a group of the jinn and they said Indeed, we heard a Quran amazing

75.meaning: Nay I swear by (the) Day (of) the Resurrection

76.arabic: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسَـٰنِ حِينٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًۭٔا مَّذْكُورًا
76.meaning: Has (there) come upon man a period of time not he was a thing mentioned

77.meaning: By the ones sent forth one after another

78.meaning: About what are they asking one another

81.meaning: When the sun is wrapped up

83.meaning: Woe to those who give less

84.meaning: When the sky is split asunder

85.meaning: By the sky containing the constellations

86.meaning: By the sky and the night comer

87.meaning: Glorify (the) name (of) your Lord the Most High

88.meaning: Has (there) come to you (the) news (of) the Overwhelming

90.meaning: Nay I swear by this city

91.meaning: By the sun and its brightness

92.meaning: By the night when it covers

94.meaning: Have not We expanded for you your breast

95.meaning: By the fig and the olive

96.meaning: Read in (the) name (of) your Lord the One Who created

97.meaning: Indeed, We revealed it in (the) Night (of) Power

98.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ مُنفَكِّينَ حَتَّىٰ تَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
98.meaning: Not were those who disbelieved from (the) People of the Book and the polytheists to be abandoned until (there) comes to them the clear evidence

99.meaning: When is shaken the earth (with) its earthquake

102.meaning: Diverts you the competition to increase

105.arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْفِيلِ
105.meaning: Have not you seen how dealt your Lord with (the) Companions (of the) Elephant

107.meaning: Have you seen the one who denies the Judgment

108.meaning: Indeed, We We have given you Al-Kauthar

110.meaning: When comes (the) Help (of) Allah and the Victory

111.meaning: Perish (the) hands (of) Abu Lahab and perish he

113.meaning: Say I seek refuge in (the) Lord (of) the dawn

114.meaning: Say I seek refuge in (the) Lord (of) mankind
